alerts.thesis: Only volume-production supplier of 200G-per-lane EML lasers — physical prerequisite for 1.6T transceivers. 20 years of InP fab know-how irreplaceable short-term. NVIDIA $2B strategic investment + multi-year EML capacity lock-in through 2027+. Three-track exposure: (1) EML for pluggable 1.6T era, (2) ELS external laser sources for CPO era, (3) OCS optical circuit switches for future AI fabric routing. Direct beneficiary of optical superCycle across pluggable → NPO → CPO transition.
